calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Hoffman, Esq. 415-957-3127 of Duane Morris for Plaintiff/Moving party .
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER WILSON SONSINI GOODRICH & ROSATI's Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Plaintiff Wilson Sonsini Goodrich & Rosati's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. Based on the arbitration award and petition, WSGR is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Amira Nature Foods Ltd. in the amount of $1,449,630.85, comprised of the principal amount of $1,132,622.54 plus prejudgment interest thereon from November 5, 2015 through June 21, 2018 at the rate of ten percent per year of $297,584.94 plus arbitrator compensation and expenses of $19,423.37 plus costs per the CCP and CRC.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order/judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
